no: Unique Artifacts v7.16 by Magus. Ensures unique items appear only once across the game. Components 0-2 (allow exceptions) must install BEFORE Core (3/4). Hard conflict with Item Revisions (both modify unique items). SCS also has item removal components that overlap

conflicts.reason: Item Revisions conflict with Unique Artifacts

sum: Ensures unique artifacts can only be found once across the game. Prevents duplicate copies of items like the Ring of Gaxx.

co.no: Allows multiple copies of Amulet of Protection +1 to exist. Install before Core

co.n: Allow non-unique Ring of Protection +2 and Cloak of Protection +2
co.tp2n: Allow non-unique Ring of Protection +2 and Cloak of Protection +2
co.no: Allows multiple copies of Ring of Protection +2 and Cloak of Protection +2. Install before Core
Allows multiple copies of Boots of Speed. Install before Core
Core component (Expanded): removes duplicate unique artifacts from the game. More lenient — some items kept in shops
Core component (Strict): removes ALL duplicate unique artifacts. Most restrictive option
Removes the bonus merchants added by Throne of Bhaal. Requires BG2
Reduces the number of magical items found throughout the game
